subcodes.first_line: The Christ had not sufficient loved ones who would keep watch over His tomb, for His sepulchre was amidst a refuse heap [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: المسیح ماکان عنده احباء کفایة بحافظون علی قبره قبره کان فی مزبلة
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @law of burial and cremation, @stories; anecdotes
